title: Peltobryon callosum
taxonomy: Peltobryon callosum is a species of moss in the family Pylaisiaceae. It belongs to the genus Peltobryon, which is a group of mosses commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Peltobryon callosum is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Bryophyta, class Bryopsida, order Bryales, family Pylaisiaceae, genus Peltobryon, and species P. callosum. The family Pylaisiaceae is a family of mosses that are characterized by their small size and delicate appearance. Peltobryon callosum is a relatively rare species of moss that is found in specific regions with high humidity and temperature.
